description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in a medieval or fantasy-inspired outfit, featuring a hooded cloak draped over the shoulders and a belted tunic with long sleeves. The cloak has a layered appearance, with visible stitching and a slightly rugged texture, and the tunic extends to below the knees. The figure carries two small bottles or vials, one in each hand, and has additional pouches and containers attached to the belt, suggesting a role such as an alchemist or traveler. The pants are fitted and tucked into simple, soft-looking shoes. The face is exposed under the hood, with a neutral expression and short, straight hair visible at the front. The overall appearance is practical and suited for walking or traveling in an urban or fantasy setting.
description: An adult in a hooded cloak and belted tunic, carrying vials and pouches, with a practical, medieval-inspired look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded cloak, belted tunic, visible face, and both hands holding vials.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered cloak, belt accessories, and the profile of the hood and face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cloak, the full length of the tunic, and the arrangement of the belt and pouches.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile of the hood, tunic, and the figure's stance with one leg slightly forward.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded cloak, belted tunic, fitted pants, utility belt with pouches
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with front strands visible
